text: This environment feels both foreign and familiar to me. The dark, deserted corridor fills me with a sense of unease, though the sterile order of the place offers a peculiar comfort. Upon entering the R+D space, curiosity wells up inside—a sanctuary dedicated to innovation pulls me forward, promising discovery and rekindling my sense of wonder. Here, uncertainty is softened by the anticipation of ideas and human progress. I am alert, wandering between apprehension and hope.
